label: Agent System Ontology

artifact_metadata.source_product_rule: research notes are evidence; this file is the canonical ontology product
artifact_metadata.non_subject_metadata_rule: ontology-engineering concepts may govern the artifact but must not appear as agent-system terms

design_references.boundary: artifact governance only, not agent-system subject terms

planes.label: Runtime Plane
planes.definition: agent-system aspect that contains sessions, actors, models, transcripts, and observable runtime events

planes.label: Info Plane
planes.definition: agent-system aspect that contains text, instructions, messages, command output, storage resources, indexes, and disclosure controls

planes.label: Memory Plane
planes.definition: agent-system aspect that contains document ingestion, chunking, embedding, retrieval, ranking, and context construction

planes.label: Orchestration Plane
planes.definition: agent-system aspect that distributes tasks, routes work, manages subagents, evaluates output, and synthesizes results

planes.label: Tool Plane
planes.definition: agent-system aspect that discovers tools, matches definitions, calls tools, executes operations, and returns tool results

planes.label: Safety Plane
planes.definition: agent-system aspect that governs trust boundaries, permissions, sandboxing, network control, pattern scans, and commit decisions

planes.label: Feedback Plane
planes.definition: agent-system aspect that records warnings, feedback, logs, reviews, optimization loops, and recovery events

planes.label: Adapter Plane
planes.definition: agent-system aspect that maps protocol, framework, statechart, benchmark, and export profiles without redefining core runtime terms

hygiene_gates: no ontology-engineering metadata term may appear in terms
every term has id, kind, plane_id, label, definition, and source_ids
every term plane_id resolves to a plane
every plane term_id resolves to a term
definitions are non-circular under exact label matching
living source IDs used by canonical terms are normalized
future-dated and needs-targeted-check sources are not active evidence
hidden chain-of-thought is not a required term, relation, field, fixture, or UI display
taxonomy and composition relations are marked acyclic
adapter terms do not redefine core runtime terms
relations have id, family, label, definition, domain, range, and source_ids
every module has id, plane_id, label, definition, source_ids, and class_ids
every class has id, kind, plane_id, module_id, label, definition, and source_ids
every object property has id, family, label, definition, domain, range, and source_ids
every data property has id, label, definition, domain, range, and source_ids
every individual has id, label, class_id, definition, and source_ids
every axiom has id, type, statement, and source_ids
